origin: UAT 2026-04-12 finding #46 — CDU autonomous agency cross-MDA duplicate

ground_truth_policy.description: CDU is an autonomous agency structurally under the Ministry of Agriculture, but for identity resolution purposes it MUST be treated as a standalone MDA with its own mda_id. Some MDAs submitted CDU data separately; others embedded CDU staff in Agriculture-branded files. In both cases, those staff resolve to CDU, not to Agriculture. The parent-child relationship is metadata used only for reporting rollups, never for identity routing.

rules.statement: CDU has its own mda_id, distinct from the Ministry of Agriculture's mda_id. All identity queries (PersonIdentityService resolve and search) use mda_id directly with no parent-child traversal.

When the parser detects CDU sub-section headers within an Agriculture file (multi-word MDA name detection as already implemented in scripts/legacy-report/car-loan-parse.ts), those records resolve to CDU's mda_id, never to Agriculture's mda_id.
When CDU submits its own file (not embedded in Agriculture), records resolve identically to the same CDU mda_id.

mdas.reporting_parent_mda = AGRICULTURE is metadata. Reports that aggregate 'all Agriculture ministry including CDU' must opt into the rollup explicitly via a join on reporting_parent_mda. Default portfolio totals and dashboard figures do not implicitly include child MDAs — each MDA stands on its own mda_id.

columns_added: is_autonomous BOOLEAN — CDU = true; most MDAs = false
reporting_parent_mda INT NULLABLE REFERENCES mdas.mda_id — CDU.reporting_parent_mda = AGRICULTURE.mda_id; most MDAs = NULL

test_cases.input: Record uploaded via an Agriculture-branded file, but appearing under a CDU sub-section header in the source spreadsheet
test_cases.expected_mda_file_label_in_source: AGRICULTURE or AGRICULTURE AND RURAL DEVELOPMENT

test_cases.input: Record uploaded via a file labelled CDU directly (no Agriculture wrapper)
Dashboard tile showing Ministry of Agriculture Total Exposure
test_cases.expected_behaviour_opt_in: Includes CDU when report explicitly joins on reporting_parent_mda

records_pending: Actual CDU-in-Agriculture-file record IDs from catalog.json to be populated at Story 17.21 (MDA parent/child taxonomy) kickoff. Side-quest mda-resolve.ts already contains the resolution logic that must be preserved in production. Policy above is signed-off ground truth.

side_quest_reference.note: Contains 63 canonical MDAs + 200+ aliases + parent/child relationships including CDU. Port to production as part of Story 17.2.
